name: The Miyazaki Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Miyazaki Bank, Ltd. provides banking products and services to individual and corporate clients in Japan. It offers current account, savings, notification, settlement, fixed, tax reserve, and non-resident yen deposits, as well as negotiable certificates of deposit. The company also provides bills lending, certificates lending, securities lending, and overdraft services; proxy loans; leasing services; export, import, remittance, and other foreign exchange services; bonds and registration services; pension contribution operation and management services; and M&A and financial product brokerage services. In addition, it invests in government, municipal, and corporate bonds, as well as in stocks and other securities; manages funds; discounts on bank bills, commercial bills, and bills of exchange bills; and sells public bond windows, investment trust windows, and insurance products. Further, the company provides money transfer, payments collection, agency work, commercial papers, syndication, trust agency, safe deposit, and debt guarantee services; and representative services for SME infrastructure maintenance organizations, worker retirement allowance mutual aid organizations, etc. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 96 branches; and 396 automatic teller machines. The Miyazaki Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Miyazaki, Japan.
